arts.ttl: Transfer Talk: Chelsea, Tottenham eye Lecce wonderkid Dorgu
arts.sum: Lecce left-back Patrick Dorgu is being tracked by the likes of Chelsea and Tottenham Hotspur. Transfer Talk has the latest.

arts.ttl: Liverpool 2-1 Chelsea: Player ratings as Reds reclaim top spot
arts.sum: Liverpool thought they had another spot-kick late in the half only for a VAR review to show Sanchez getting an important touch on the ball before upending Jones. The Scouse midfielder provided the Reds with cutting edge in the final third - winning a penalty and scoring the winning goal - and also worked his socks off in the defensive third too - making a stunning block to deny Cole Palmer what looked like a certain goal in the first half.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca reveals reason for early Jadon Sancho withdrawal in Chelsea's loss to Liverpool
arts.sum: Chelsea head coach Enzo Maresca reveals the reason behind his decision to withdraw Jadon Sancho at half time of Sunday's Premier League defeat to Liverpool.

arts.ttl: Former Liverpool striker Daniel Sturridge says the players are 'buying into' Arne Slot after Chelsea scalp as Micah Richards credits new manager for making title challengers a lot more solid defensively'
arts.sum: Sky Sports pundits Daniel Sturridge, Micah Richards and Jamie Carragher were full of praise for new Liverpool manager Arne Slot after his side's 2-1 victory over Chelsea on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Maresca hails 'one of best' Chelsea displays of season
arts.sum: Chelsea manager Enzo Maresca says 2-1defeat by Liverpool at Anfield is not a setback, as their performance was probably "the best so far this season" in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Liverpool reclaim top spot as Curtis Jones downs Chelsea after penalty drama - 5 talking points
arts.sum: LIVERPOOL 2-1 CHELSEA: Mohamed Salah's opener was cancelled out by Nicolas Jackson at Anfield, but Curtis Jones restored Liverpool's advantage in a competitive match

arts.ttl: Liverpool back on top as Curtis Jones grabs the winner against Chelsea
arts.sum: Liverpool have now won 10 out of their first 11 games under Arne Slot.
